name: Garlic Chicken Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 2 large Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into thin strips.
2. In a small bowl, blend sherry, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, and minced garlic. Stir in the chicken. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Combine broth, vinegar, red pepper flakes, and remaining 1 tablespoon cornstarch in another bowl.
4. Cook vermicelli according to package directions, omitting salt.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and stir-fry for 3 minutes. Remove the chicken.
6. Heat remaining oil in the same pan over high heat. Add carrots and green bell pepper; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
7. Return the chicken to the pan with the broth mixture. Cook, stirring, until the mixture boils and thickens.
8. Remove from heat and stir in soy sauce. Drain vermicelli and arrange on a serving platter. Top with the chicken and vegetable mixture.
